message:
bd-2xl.15: add real-world Mermaid corpus ingestion pipeline

Implements corpus processing for compatibility tracking:
- Corpus loader with JSONL support and content-hash deduplication
- Complexity classification (simple/moderate/complex)
- Compatibility checker with parse/layout/render validation
- Trend analysis with per-type stats and failure signatures
- Synthetic corpus for testing when no external data exists
- Evidence logging with structured output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
